product.description:
Xiao Bai Cai is another health-promoting vegetable.
It's a good source of folate and Vitamins B6, C and K, and is fantastic when it comes tomaintaining brain function, promoting healthy teeth, gums and bones, and supporting a healthy functioning immune system.
Seller : Vegeponics Singapore Pte Ltd.
111 Nythal Road, Singapore 628598

metaData.Key Information:
- SG Local Produce: Farm to table in 24 hours, Local Freshness!
- Indoor controlled environment farming: Pesticide-free, Consistent high quality!
- Soil-grown vegetables: More nutrients, better taste!
metaData.Storage Information: Recommended to store at chilled temperature between 6 - 10 degree celsius

metaData.Key Information: Xiao Bai Cai is a popular leafy vegetable used in Chinese cooking, and is typically stir-fired, blanched, or steamed. They produce a loose head of leaves with thick leaf stalks that light green or whitish near the base.
